microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized, self-service system**, standardizing deployment workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ impact** across Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and **self-service scheduling APIs** that cut operational toil by 30% and enabled teams to execute drills without manual intervention.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability — delivering a **rack-level drill program in 4 months** with a 94% recovery rate, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a continuous validation model across enterprise deployments.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as **bridge lead** for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring full-stack coordination across engineering and ops.

Built an internal **AI agent for drill planning**, restructuring automation workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase pilot execution capacity by 21% — directly expanding the program's customer-facing throughput.
microsoft_2023: Championed **customer adoption** of AI-driven code generation tooling, running technical demos and integration sessions that drove utilization across 14 Azure service teams and saved **37 engineering hours monthly**.

Shaped the product roadmap toward intent-based YAML generation by conducting 11+ structured user interviews with engineering customers, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating them into **actionable pilot requirements**.

Improved data retrieval for downstream integrations by enforcing metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search tool**, cutting lookup time by 83% across customer-facing workflows.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and cut region launch timelines by 28% by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ engineering teams.

Executed technical discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify **81 hours of manual toil per region launch**, then built a deployment roadmap to automate critical paths and reduce customer-impacting delays.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to surface automation gaps and toil distribution across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to prioritize high-impact pilots and allocate engineering capacity toward scalable deployment tooling.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by owning the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and coordinating cross-functional deployment execution.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies across a full deployment cycle — sprint planning, backlog grooming, and retrospectives — resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake process for ongoing rollout.

Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual intervention during customer-site rollouts.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end proposal and invoicing workflow for 200+ monthly customers, deploying a new CRM process that cut scoping cycle time and improved conversion at each pilot stage.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and lifted conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — optimizing the website, Google profile, and customer onboarding funnel end-to-end.

Built a financial profitability model across **1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks, delivering pricing insights that directly improved leadership's ability to scope and position high-value customer engagements.
